client.problem: your outdated website is turning away potential customers and hurting your brand
client.problemDescription:
1. Outdated design hurts first impressions
    Your current website looks like it was built years ago. Visitors form an opinion about your business within 3 seconds of landing on your site — and right now, that first impression doesn't reflect the quality of your work.
  2. Poor mobile experience
    Over 60% of your traffic comes from mobile devices, but the current site isn't optimized for smaller screens. This means potential customers are bouncing before they ever see what you offer.
  3. No clear path to conversion
    The current site lacks clear calls-to-action. Visitors land on the homepage but don't know what to do next — there's no guided journey from interest to inquiry.
client.solution: modern, conversion-optimized website built on a fast, maintainable platform
client.solutionDescription:
1. Clean, modern design that builds trust
    A professionally designed website that reflects your brand's quality and makes a strong first impression. Clean typography, intentional whitespace, and a cohesive color palette.
  2. Fully responsive mobile-first layout
    Every page will be designed mobile-first, ensuring a seamless experience on phones, tablets, and desktops. No more pinching and zooming.
  3. Strategic conversion funnel
    Clear calls-to-action on every page, an intuitive navigation structure, and a streamlined contact flow that makes it easy for visitors to become leads.

project.sowDescription:
[Your Company] will design and build a modern, conversion-optimized website. The scope includes:

  • One (1) complete website redesign with up to 8 pages
  • One (1) responsive design system (mobile, tablet, desktop)
  • One (1) contact form with email notifications
  • Basic SEO setup (meta tags, sitemap, page speed optimization)
  • Content migration from the existing site
  • Training session for the client's team on how to update content

timeline.task: Discovery & Planning — Kickoff call, gather brand assets, review current analytics, define sitemap and wireframes
Design — Create design mockups for homepage and key pages, iterate based on your feedback
Development — Build the site, implement responsive layouts, integrate contact form
QA, Content & Launch — Migrate content, test across devices, SEO setup, training, and go-live
